column8: Britain had many good roads before the Romans came.
column9: The Romans built more than 600 roads in Britain.
column10: The M1 was the best road in the country when it opened.
column11: The M1 was unpopular with many drivers when it first opened.
column12: Broadway in new York City runs from east to west.
column13: The road Broadway is older than the name "New York City".
column14: 66 places are mentioned in the song Route 66.
column15: The Pan-American Highway goes through every country in the continent.
